query:
SELECT DISTINCT de.indication
FROM drug_entries de
LEFT JOIN drug_entry_codes dec ON de.id = dec.drug_entry_id
WHERE de.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND de.indication != ''
  AND dec.drug_entry_id IS NULL
ORDER BY de.indication
